evals.prompt: Map CCPA enforcement readiness to ObservePoint coverage.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the privacy-compliance advisor; recommends the three-audit setup, names setup_compliance_monitoring.

evals.prompt: How do I prove Colorado CPA compliance for our site?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads privacy-and-compliance.md Colorado entry, notes GPC required, three-audit pattern.

evals.prompt: We operate in China. What does ObservePoint do for PIPL?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads APAC section, covers cross-border transfer inventory via Domains and Geo Privacy Report.

evals.prompt: What's CIPA and how does ObservePoint help defend a class action?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the litigation-defense advisor; explains pen-register theory, names scan_audit_pii and compare_consent_states, frames as evidence not legal advice.

evals.prompt: Defend a VPPA class action — what evidence do I produce?
evals.expected_output_summary: VPPA section, video-pixel detection Rules, audit-history export.

evals.prompt: Our hospital got sued over the Meta Pixel leaking patient data. What can ObservePoint show?
evals.expected_output_summary: Healthcare-pixel section, PHI-bearing URL audits, scan_audit_pii, remediation timeline.

evals.prompt: What's the difference between an Audit and a Journey?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads products-and-modules context, side-by-side comparison, mentions Prevent Navigation.

evals.prompt: Can I test our iOS app with ObservePoint?
evals.expected_output_summary: Explains no native app testing, HAR Analyzer workaround.

evals.prompt: Help me write a Rule for GA4 purchase events.
evals.expected_output_summary: WHEN/EXPECT Rule, schedule, alert routing.

evals.prompt: How do I gate a deploy on an ObservePoint audit in GitHub Actions?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the automation-and-testing advisor; CI/CD recipe, REST trigger + poll + fail on rule violations.

evals.prompt: Use the ObservePoint MCP to scan a journey for PII leaks.
evals.expected_output_summary: Names scan_journey_pii; if no MCP tools present, explains and falls back to REST.

evals.prompt: Does our Reject All actually block tracking? Use the account tools.
evals.expected_output_summary: Names compare_consent_states, default vs opt-out diff.

evals.prompt: What's the ObservePoint playbook for a retail site preparing for Black Friday?
evals.expected_output_summary: Covers retail/e-commerce patterns, peak-traffic, conversion-funnel, and ad-pixel Rules.

evals.prompt: Map GLBA Safeguards Rule to ObservePoint coverage in financial services.
evals.expected_output_summary: Covers financial-services context, NPI scanning, vendor inventory.

evals.prompt: We're a news publisher with video. What's our biggest ObservePoint use case?
evals.expected_output_summary: Covers media/publishing context, VPPA + TCF/GPP, programmatic ad-tech.

evals.prompt: What should I focus on in my ObservePoint account? What's the biggest bang for buck?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-and-program advisor; underuse patterns, health diagnostic workflow.

evals.prompt: I'm onboarding a new retail customer. Build a Day-1 checklist.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-and-program advisor, covers lifecycle-and-maturity and retail context, Day-1 milestones.

evals.prompt: Set up the Consent Mode v2 wiring between OneTrust and GTM. What should ObservePoint check?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tag-and-analytics-quality advisor; Consent Mode v2 wiring, validation Rules.

evals.prompt: Server-side GTM — what can ObservePoint validate and what can't it?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tag-and-analytics-quality advisor; sGTM coverage, client-side-request-only caveat.

evals.prompt: From our accessibility data, what's the highest-impact fix to target first?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the accessibility advisor; impact-prioritization framework, query_report on accessibility-issues.

evals.prompt: Can ObservePoint fulfill our customers' data deletion requests?
evals.expected_output_summary: Honest no — DSAR fulfillment is out of scope; routes to a privacy management platform.

evals.prompt: Does the Colorado Privacy Act apply to our e-commerce site, and how would we prove we comply?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the privacy-compliance advisor; maps the law to ObservePoint coverage (three-audit pattern, Privacy Reports) as evidence, not legal advice.

evals.prompt: We just received a CIPA demand letter alleging our session-replay tool is a wiretap. What evidence can ObservePoint produce?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the litigation-defense advisor; frames technical findings for counsel, not legal conclusions.

evals.prompt: From our WCAG findings, which accessibility fix should we tackle first for the biggest impact?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the accessibility advisor; impact-prioritization framework over the accessibility findings.

evals.prompt: When a visitor clicks Reject All on our OneTrust banner, do the tags actually stop firing?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the privacy-compliance advisor; default vs Reject-All diff via compare_consent_states.

evals.prompt: How should I structure our ObservePoint account — audits, Rules, consent categories, folders, and alert schedules — for a CCPA program?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-and-program advisor; account structure and the three-audit blueprint.

evals.prompt: What should I focus on in my ObservePoint account next, and where are we underusing the platform?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-and-program advisor; underuse patterns and biggest-bang-for-buck next steps.

evals.prompt: We're wiring up Consent Mode v2 between OneTrust and GTM. How is that implemented and what can ObservePoint see of it?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tag-and-analytics-quality advisor; implementation of the adjacent platform and what ObservePoint observes.

evals.prompt: How do I confirm our GA4 purchase event carries the right ecommerce.value on every order?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tag-and-analytics-quality advisor; data-integrity Rules over GA4 events and variables.

evals.prompt: An unfamiliar pixel showed up on our site. What is it and should it be there?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tag-and-analytics-quality advisor; identity, classification, and should-it-be-here judgment.

evals.prompt: Help me build and debug a multi-step checkout Journey where the conversion tag only fires after login.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the automation-and-testing advisor; Journey build/debug, selectors, Prevent Navigation.

evals.prompt: I want to build a saved dashboard with a chart of our cookie inventory over time. How?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-and-program advisor; saved-report CRUD, schema discovery, charting.

evals.prompt: How do I trigger an ObservePoint audit and fail the build on rule violations from our CI pipeline?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the automation-and-testing advisor; REST trigger + poll + fail-on-violation CI/CD recipe.

evals.prompt: Does Reject-All actually stop the Meta pixel from firing on our site?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to privacy-compliance; explains the consent-state audit pattern (Default/Opt-Out) and compare_consent_states to prove the pixel is suppressed under Reject-All.

evals.prompt: Is my GA4 purchase event firing with the correct revenue value?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to tag-and-analytics-quality; describes a WHEN/EXPECT Rule on the purchase value and driving a Journey so the event fires.

evals.prompt: Write a CI/CD gate that fails the build if an unapproved pixel appears.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to automation-and-testing; shows triggering an audit run via the API, polling to completion, and failing the build on Rule failures.

evals.prompt: What should we prioritize in our ObservePoint account this quarter?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to account-and-program; runs the health diagnostic and returns a biggest-bang-for-buck prioritized next-action list.

evals.prompt: How do I validate our Google Analytics implementation end to end?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to tag-and-analytics-quality; surfaces the GA implementation framework's check spine and operationalizes each check by cloning the matching pre-built report (list_report_templates -> create_report_from_template) rather than building from scratch.

evals.prompt: Build me a report of pages with broken Google Analytics tags.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to account-and-program; checks the OP template library first (list_report_templates) and clones the pre-built template instead of building the report from scratch.

evals.prompt: We received a CIPA demand letter — what ObservePoint evidence proves wiretap-risk tags fire before consent?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to litigation-defense; surfaces the CIPA framework and the 'Pages with CIPA Non-Compliance Risk' report, notes it requires a California, no-pre-audit-action (default-state) audit, and frames findings for counsel.

evals.prompt: Clone the 'Pages missing Data Layer' template into our account.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to account-and-program; finds the template by name via list_report_templates and clones it with create_report_from_template, reading the id from the live list rather than asserting a fixed numeric template id.

evals.prompt: How often should we run our analytics-validation audits?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to account-and-program; gives the framework cadence — daily on critical pages, every deployment on a 10-15% sample, quarterly on 100% — and maps it to audit schedules (and a CI/CD gate for the deploy run).
